nasb.text: Everything, O king, Araunah gives to the king.” And Araunah said to the king, “May the Lord your God accept you.”

esv.text: All this, O king, Araunah gives to the king.” And Araunah said to the king, “May the Lord your God accept you.”

cnv.text: 王啊，這一切亞勞拿都奉給你。”亞勞拿又對王說：“願耶和華你的　神悅納你！”

ccb.text: 王啊，仆人亚劳拿愿意把这一切都献给你，愿你的上帝耶和华悦纳你。”
